properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Hitch is not unlocked with this skin. Hitch can only be unlocked by signing up for our newsletter through the main menu.

backstory.original: Hitch started off life on the wrong foot and the wrong side of the wagon tracks. Besides the Sword Coast, the only other place he's ever called home is Durpar in Southeast Faerûn, which has been conquered by goblinoids allied with Durpar's ruling merchant house. Now, he tries to keep two steps ahead of his shady past, avoiding run-ins with the Zhentarim and other nefarious acquaintances. With his quick wit and roguish charm, Hitch plans to somehow land on his feet, on a pile of gold, with a treasure map in each hand, but until then he needs all the friends he can get.
backstory.display: 希契在充满苦难的贫民区长大。除了剑湾，他唯一称得上是家的地方是费伦东南部的都帕，那里已经被都帕最大的商行和地精所征服。现在，他试图与他不光彩的过去保持距离，避免与散塔林会和其他邪恶的熟人发生冲突。凭借他的聪明才智和无赖魅力，希契计划以某种方式摆脱目前的困境，过上自己想要的日子。但在那之前，他得先去召集他能找到的所有朋友。

description.original: Hitch stabs the nearest target in the face. Ouch!
description.display: 希契刺向距离最近的目标脸部。哎哟！

description.original: Hitch disappears into the shadows and brutally backstabs the five furthest enemies.
description.display: 希契消失在阴影中，然后残忍地背刺距离最远的 5 名敌人。

longDescription.original: Hitch disappears into the shadows and reappears behind the furthest enemy, whom he stabs. He then repeats this for the next four furthest enemies, if applicable.
longDescription.display: 希契消失在阴影中，随后在距离最远的敌人身后重新出现，并使用背刺攻击该敌人。如果还有敌人，他会依次对距离最远的另外 4 名敌人重复此攻击。

description.desc: Increase the damage of Champions by $amount% if their charisma score is 14 or higher.
魅力 14 或以上的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害

tipText.original: Hitch increases the damage of Champions with high Charisma scores. Use Champions with high scores to increase their damage.
tipText.display: 希契使高魅力勇士的伤害提高。使用高魅力勇士以提高其伤害。

description.desc: Adds a thrown Dagger to Hitch's Base Attack
在希契的基本攻击中加入一把飞刀

tipText.original: Hitch somehow always has a spare dagger up his sleeve, and will toss it at a random enemy before he attacks.
tipText.display: 希契总在袖子里藏一把备用匕首，并在发动攻击前扔向一名随机敌人。

description.desc: Hitch's Daggers have a $hitch_ricochet_chance% chance to ricochet to another enemy (up to $limit times), granting 1 stack, with each stack increasing the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $amount___2% (Stacks decay by 10% every 10 seconds)^^$hitch_ricochet_reduction_time
希契的小刀有 $hitch_ricochet_chance% 几率弹向另一名敌人 （最多不超过 $limit 次），并获得一层堆叠。每层堆叠都会提升$(upgrade_name id___2)的效果 $amount___2%（堆叠层数每 10 秒衰减 10%）^^$hitch_ricochet_reduction_time

specializationDescription.original: Hitch always has yet another spare dagger to toss, thus increasing the number of daggers he throws before attacking.
specializationDescription.display: 希契还有一把可以投掷的备用匕首，从而增加了发动攻击前投掷的匕首数量。

specializationDescription.original: Hitch spends more time chatting with interesting people, further increasing the damage of your Champions with a high charisma score.
specializationDescription.display: 希契花费更多时间与有趣的勇士聊天，从而使高魅力勇士的伤害进一步提高。

description.original: I can take a backseat if you'll lead the way.
description.display: 如果你来指挥，我可以退居幕后。
来吧，管他冲锋还是什么！

description.original: I've always go another one, too.
Careful, you might lose an eye.
description.display: 小心，你可能会失去一只眼。

description.original: Have you seen my other dagger?
description.display: 你看到我的另一把匕首了吗？

description.original: I am going to go SO FAST!

effects.description: Hitch also counts as a Centaur

description.original: You guys do your thing. I'll be supervising from over here.
description.display: 你们忙你们的。我在这边监督。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Hitch started off life on the wrong foot and the wrong side of the wagon tracks. Besides the Sword Coast, the only other place he's ever called home is Durpar in Southeast Faerûn, which has been conquered by goblinoids allied with Durpar's ruling merchant house. Now, he tries to keep two steps ahead of his shady past, avoiding run-ins with the Zhentarim and other nefarious acquaintances. With his quick wit and roguish charm, Hitch plans to somehow land on his feet, on a pile of gold, with a treasure map in each hand, but until then he needs all the friends he can get.
